text:
Once upon a time there was a bear who loved snowballs. This bear would wear a sweater and make these marvelous snowball treats. One day someone stole his snowball maker. Angry, our brave bear decided there would be nothing stolen.

He took his own special snowy shovel. We call it the Whisper Flake. He put some minty-leaves inside. When he flicked them they would flutter around and scoop up snow crystals. Each scoop was lovingly placed into his secret stash.

With every snowflake treasure he saved. Our bear became adept. They fell from high places? They glided through the air. They reached places others couldn't. They would disappear into bags and backpacks. Everyone loved them!

But then someone saw it. Perhaps it was a fish? Or maybe a squirrel? With one glance the thief just threw them away. That’s how the bear recovered his treasure. And they’ve been flying through bags ever since. Even snowdrop butterflies think they’re cool. That
